children.text: Laws and regulations applicable to added lands; free use of roads maintained by State
All laws applicable to and in force within the Mount Rainier National Park as of

children.tail: , and all regulations issued pursuant thereto, are made applicable to and extended over the land added to the said park by
, That no fee or charge shall be made by the United States for the use of any roads in said park built or maintained exclusively by the State of Washington.
